key_risks: Continued mega-cap tech selloff could spill into broad risk-off, hurting small caps and cyclicals despite breadth
Biotech and Taiwan are high-volatility positions vulnerable to reversal of recent sharp gains
Higher long-end yields (10y 4.51%, sticky 4.2% CPI) could pressure rate-sensitive small caps and growth-momentum names
Semiconductor weakness (Micron -13%, Samsung) could broaden into Taiwan chip supply chain

portfolio.rationale: Strong relative momentum (+8.7% 30d) and positive 7d return amid mega-cap tech weakness; broad factor exposure with persistence.
Solid breadth-driven cyclical with +4% 30d, defense/aerospace tailwinds and domestic resilience.
Best 7d/30d breadth participation (+1.1%/+3.8%); benefits from broadening rally away from concentrated mega-cap tech.
Sharp positive momentum (+8.7% 7d, +11.8% 30d) suggesting M&A/data catalysts and idiosyncratic strength uncorrelated to tech selloff.
Semiconductor supply chain strength with positive 7d (+1.4%) and strong 30d (+8.7%) despite Korea/Micron weakness; quality chip exposure.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward broadening market breadth and momentum leaders while underweighting mega-cap tech concentration that dragged the index; emphasize cyclicals, small caps, and strong-momentum healthcare/semis with positive recent trends.
rationale_summary: Capture rotation away from concentrated mega-cap tech weakness into breadth leaders (small caps, industrials, momentum, biotech) plus quality semiconductor exposure via Taiwan.
